---
title: "Exploring Li-ion conductivity in cubic, tetragonal and mixed-phase Al-substituted Li7La3Zr2O12 using atomistic simulations and effective medium theory"
author: ["Mauricio R Bonilla", "Fabián A García Daza", "Javier Carrasco", "Elena Akhmatskaya"]
date: 2019-08-15
publication: "Acta Materialia, **175**, 426-435 (2019)."
categories: ["SSBs"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.actamat.2019.06.033
url_preprint:
journ: "Acta Materialia"
issue: 175
page: 426-435
year: 2019
image: featured.png
pub_number: 5
---
